description_long: This is a large, modern commercial jet airliner with a wide fuselage and four turbofan engines mounted under its low, swept-back wings. The aircraft is predominantly white with blue accents, including a blue tail fin marked with 'A380' and the Airbus logo. The wings feature noticeable winglets at their tips, and the tail section has a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible. The landing gear is not visible in these images, suggesting it is either retracted or not modeled. The overall design is streamlined for efficient high-speed flight, typical of long-haul passenger aircraft.
description: A large, white and blue commercial jet airliner with four underwing engines, swept low wings with winglets, and a prominent vertical tail fin.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, four engines, and the blue tail fin with 'A380' marking.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wingspan, winglets, and the blue section of the tail fin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the engines, fuselage, and tail fin from the other side.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the nose, cockpit windows, and the arrangement of the four engines under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings featuring upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Four turbofan engines mounted under the wings, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable tricycle configuration based on aircraft type.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
